zh.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Carew de Brienne於大約1296年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維。她於大約1317年與Sir Guy Bryan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年4月12日在威爾士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Cary , used mainly as a girl's name, under the influence of Carrie . In Irish use, it is sometimes a transferred use of the surname, an Anglicized form of Ó Ciardha (‘descendant of Ciardha’) or Mac Fhiachra (‘son of Fiachra’).

en.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Carew de Brienne was born about 1296, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. She married Sir Guy Bryan about 1317. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 12 April 1348, in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 53, and was buried in Blackfriars, London, England, United Kingdom.

Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1348, à Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Carew de Brienneは約1296年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで生まれた。約1317年にSir Guy Bryanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1348年4月12日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアヘイバーフォードウエストで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Carew de Brienne(은)는 대략 1296년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1317년 Sir Guy Bryan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 4월 12일 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드w스트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블랙프리아르스에 묻혔다.

Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Carew de Brienne родилась около 1296 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Guy Bryan около 1317 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 апреля 1348 г. в местности хавирфордвест, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
